title: Wooden Plier Organizer - Rectangular Hardwood Pliers Holder with 12 Holes Storage Box for Jeweller
features: Application: It is suitable for storing pliers of different mini sizes and types. It is a professional pliers storage rack that can make the pliers neatly classified.

Material: Made of whole beech wood with high-hardness for long term use.
Size: 80 x 148mm / 3.2 x 5.8". Hole width: 14mm/0.55". Hole depth: 19mm/0.75".
